summary: A bitter dispute between Vicount Kuransivil Tworq and Commander Merbin of the Otto Han army has escalated into a military revolt. Meanwhile, Elric Merb is struggling with delusions that he is a hero and is trying to prove himself by establishing a new order. The situation becomes even more complicated as Merbin's wife, Faverone, declares her loyalty to Tworq and vows to follow his orders.
key_moments: Vicount Kuransivil Tworq accuses Commander Merbin of turning the army against him
Elric Merb is plagued by delusions of being a hero and tries to prove himself
Faverone declares her loyalty to Tworq and vows to follow his orders
